title: Coverage, Thresholds, and Meaningful Evidence · Policy Clinic: Coverage Kinds
summary: Set coverage policy that exposes risk without encouraging empty tests. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates coverage kinds increment in a changed-code coverage and exception policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.
Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
